title: How to Use Higgsfield AI Like a PRO – AI Marketing Workflow
summary: Higgsfield Supercomputer is an AI super-agent platform that converts a single idea into a full marketing campaign across multiple formats: TV ads, podcast clips, vertical reels, and character-driven shorts. The tool maintains character and style consistency across generated scenes and automates the content creation workflow.
writeup: The video demonstrates Higgsfield Supercomputer, an AI super-agent platform that turns a single idea into a full marketing campaign spanning multiple formats: TV ads, podcast clips, vertical reels, and character-driven shorts. It shows how the tool holds character and style consistency across generated scenes while automating the content creation workflow. The takeaway is a practical look at multi-format generation from one prompt, with consistency maintained across outputs.
